description_long: This is a five-arm ceiling-mounted sconce chandelier with a rustic, vintage appearance. Each arm supports a lampshade that appears to be wrapped in a textured, fabric-like material, tied with a decorative bow. The central column and arms are constructed from a metal frame, finished in a muted, weathered tone, and the fixture is suspended by a sturdy metal chain. The lampshades are cylindrical and slightly flared, giving the piece a soft, inviting look. The overall design is ornate yet understated, with gentle curves and subtle scrollwork on the arms. The fixture is designed to provide ambient lighting in a space, likely using incandescent bulbs beneath each shade.
description: A rustic five-arm ceiling chandelier with fabric-wrapped lampshades and decorative bows, suspended by a metal chain. The design features gentle curves, subtle scrollwork, and a weathered finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing all five fabric-wrapped lampshades and the central column, with the chain extending upward.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the scrollwork on the arms and the arrangement of the lampshades.
description_view_2: Rear view with a clear look at the symmetrical placement of the arms and the fabric texture of the shades.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the bows on the lampshades and the curvature of the metal arms.
attribute_fixture_design: Rustic vintage chandelier with fabric-wrapped shades, decorative bows, and subtle scrollwork on the metal arms. The design evokes a cozy, traditional aesthetic.
